deadlines.label: Pre-Proposal Meeting (Non-Mandatory)
deadlines.notes: Non-mandatory meeting via Microsoft Teams, limited to administrative questions about OpenGov only — no technical or RFP-specific questions will be answered. Short 15-minute window. Attending may help clarify submission mechanics but will not provide competitive intelligence.

deadlines.label: Question Submission Deadline
deadlines.notes: All questions, comments, and exceptions must be submitted via OpenGov by this deadline. Questions received after this date may not be acknowledged. Only 14 calendar days remain between this deadline and proposal due date, so teams should finalize technical questions early to allow time to incorporate answers into the proposal.

deadlines.label: Proposal Submission Deadline
deadlines.notes: Sealed bid process — both bids and pricing are sealed. Proposals must be submitted electronically via OpenGov. This is a best-value evaluation (not lowest price), with Phase I technical scoring followed by Phase II demonstrations/interviews for elevated proposals. Only 29 calendar days from release to due date, which is a tight turnaround given the extensive technical requirements including SAM.gov registration, insurance COIs, security assessment, and detailed technical proposal.
